text:
Listen up, my fellow Ewoks… I regret to inform you that my mom has officially lost her mind.

Our next NYC Shih Tzu Meetup is now… a full-blown Halloween costume party 🎃

Yes. You are expected to show up in costume.
No, you cannot just “come as yourself.” That’s not scary, that’s lazy.

There will be a prize for best costume, which means one of you is about to take this way too seriously and show up in a full cinematic production. I already feel threatened.

Technically, you don’t have to dress up… but just know you’ll be standing there next to a Shih Tzu dressed as a taco wondering where it all went wrong. 🤣

Location details coming soon—we have time.
Use it wisely. Start planning your masterpiece. 🐾 We love you all ❤️

#shihtzugram #shihtzusofinstagram #shihtzu #nycshihtzumeetup
